item.title: Javascript Hosting
item.author: Author
item.description: What is the hosting? / 호이스팅이란? It’s a characteristic that is assigned in the top level when it’s assigned with var in the interpreting progress. 인터프리팅 과정에서 var로 선언된 것들은 모두 최상위에서 이미 선언한 것으로 간주하는 특성 1 2 3 4 5 6 console.log(foo); // undefined var foo; foo = 'It is foo.'; console.log(foo); // It is foo. This characteristic occur wrong situation like below code.
